negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for negative
% SZS output start Proof for negative
1. ailton = ailton_silva [input(axiom)]
2. football_player(ailton) & loaned_to(ailton,braga) [input(axiom)]
4. football_club(nautico) & football_club(braga) [input(axiom)]
7. ? [X0] : (football_club(X0) & loaned_to(ailton,X0)) [input(conjecture)]
8. ~? [X0] : (football_club(X0) & loaned_to(ailton,X0)) [negated conjecture 7]
10. loaned_to(ailton,braga) [pure predicate removal 2]
12. ! [X0] : (~football_club(X0) | ~loaned_to(ailton,X0)) [ennf transformation 8]
13. ailton = ailton_silva [cnf transformation 1]
14. loaned_to(ailton,braga) [cnf transformation 10]
15. football_club(braga) [cnf transformation 4]
24. ~football_club(X0) | ~loaned_to(ailton,X0) [cnf transformation 12]
25. loaned_to(ailton_silva,braga) [definition unfolding 14,13]
29. ~loaned_to(ailton_silva,X0) | ~football_club(X0) [definition unfolding 24,13]
30. ~football_club(braga) [resolution 25,29]
31. $false [forward subsumption resolution 30,15]
% SZS output end Proof for negative
% Termination reason: Refutation
